title: Polka Dot Grosgrain Ribbon 10mm X 22m Black and White Dot Craft Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Christmas DIY Crafts Hair Bows Wedding Party Decor Sewing and Home Decoration
features: SIZES - Polka dot grosgrain ribbon is available in four widths: 1 1/2 inch (38mm), 3/4 inch (20 mm), 5/8 inch (15 mm), and 3/8 inch (10 mm). Each roll is approximately 25 yards/22 meters long

POLKA DOT - Polka dot grosgrain ribbon is made of high-quality polyester fiber. Small polka dots in a clear colorfast pattern are printed on one side of the grosgrain ribbon and the other side is a solid color

MORE COLOR CHOICE - Our polka dot ribbons are available in a variety of colors such as red with white dots, green with white dots, pink with white dots, black with white dots, and navy blue with white dots to meet all your creative needs

VARIOUS USAGE - Polka dot ribbons are great for gift wrapping, making hair bows and pet bows, Christmas and wreath decor, clothing alterations and sewing projects, crafting, Valentine's Day and wedding decor, cute themed birthday party decor, baby diaper cake ribbons, baby shower, Easter decorations and more

FRIENDLY REMINDER - The ribbon images are professionally crafted by our design department. Due to differences in cameras, phones, and computer screen lighting, there might be slight color variations. We are committed to providing customers with high-quality ribbons, and if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us
